---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: /custom.css
---
::: {.justify}

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

## Peer-reviewed Articles


Castillo, J. C., Canales Sellés, R., Laffert, A., & Urzúa, T. (2026). Justification trajectories for pension inequality in Chile (2016–2023): the role of social class and beliefs in meritocracy. [Frontiers in Sociology, 11, 1771856](https://doi.org/10.3389/fsoc.2026.1771856). 

Castillo, J. C., Miranda, D., Correa, T., Tobar, N., Bachmann, I., Urzúa, T. (2026). Do girls underestimate their digital skills? Gender differences in digital self-efficacy in the Chilean school context. Perspectiva Educacional, 65(3). **Currently being published**.


## In Preparation

**Stability and comparability of meritocratic beliefs in school-age students: A measurement invariance approach across time and cohorts**. Andreas Laffert, Juan Carlos Castillo, René Canales, Tomás Urzúa & Kevin Carrasco. **Submited**. [Preprint](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/gvbqw_v1)

Measuring Digital Self-Efficacy in International Large-Scale Assessments: An Iternational Comparison Between ICILS and PISA. Daniel Miranda, Ismael Aguayo, Nicolás Tobar, Tomás Urzúa, Juan Carlos Castillo. **Subtimed**.

Two Decades of Changes in Social Cohesion in Latin America (2004–2023). Juan Carlos Castillo, Julio Iturra, Gabriel Cortés, Tomás Urzúa. **In progress**. 


## Research Reports and Data Visualizations

Urzúa, T., Iturra, J., Canales, R., Laffert, A. & Castillo, J.C. (2025). [Visualizador Longitudinal de Cohesión Social en Chile (Release)](https://ocs-coes.shinyapps.io/ocs-viselsoc/). Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17408346

Urzúa, T., Canales, R., Laffert, A. & Castillo, J. C. (2025). [Documento Metodológico VisELSOC (Release)](https://ocscoes.github.io/propuesta-medicion-elsoc/output/book-cohesion-elsoc/docs/). Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17418461

Urzúa, T., Castillo, J. C., Miranda, D. (2026). [Estudio de Notas de la Facultad de Ciencias Sociales de la Universidad de Chile](https://data-soc.github.io/estudio-notas/docs/).
:::
